articles.title: Lime raises $167M in IPO after years of teasing a public debut
articles.description: The nine-year-old scooter and bike-share company has said it needs the funds to help pay down around $1 billion in liabilities.

articles.title: Venice AI becomes a unicorn with $65M Series A as its privacy-first AI platform takes off
articles.description: Venice AI is already profitable, with annualized run-rate revenues of over $70 million, CEO Erik Voorhees said.

articles.title: Gemini Spark, Google’s agentic assistant, is now available on Mac
articles.description: Google's 24/7 agentic assistant, Gemini Spark, comes to Mac alongside other improvements, like real-time tracking and support for more apps.

articles.title: Sony to end physical PlayStation game disc production in 2028
articles.description: Sony will stop producing physical discs for all new PlayStation games beginning in 2028, as the company embraces an all-digital future.

articles.title: Builders Stage agenda revealed: Practical strategies for scaling startups at TechCrunch Disrupt 2026
articles.description: The Builders Stage is returning to TechCrunch Disrupt 2026, bringing together 10,000+ founders, startup operators, and investors for practical conversations. and Q&A on what it takes to build and scale successful companies. Register now to save up to $330.

articles.title: Meta, like SpaceX, looks to turn excess AI compute into cash
articles.description: Meta is developing plans for a cloud infrastructure business, selling access to AI compute power and models. The move would pit it against the big cloud providers like Amazon Web Services, Google Cloud, and Microsoft Azure.

articles.title: The ‘Father of the Internet’ is finally retiring
articles.description: Vinton Cerf, one of the creators of the protocols underlying the internet, will step down as Google's chief internet evangelist next week.

articles.title: Trump drops restrictions on Anthropic’s Mythos and Fable models
articles.description: The Trump administration's erratic approach to AI policymaking has left companies across the industry with little clarity about what will govern future model releases.

articles.title: Wayve launches $85M employee tender offer at $8.5B valuation
articles.description: Wayve’s offering is part of a growing trend of AI startups using employee tenders as a strategic tool to attract and retain talent.

articles.title: Startup Battlefield Australia application closes in days: Apply before July 6
articles.description: What if one pitch changed everything? The next company nobody has heard of yet is building something that will matter. It could be yours.

articles.title: OpenClaw is finally available on Android and iOS
articles.description: The free open source agentic program is finally invading your phone.

articles.title: The DeepMind trio who built a poker AI are now making money for quant hedge funds
articles.description: EquiLibre Technologies, a Prague-based AI lab founded by three ex-DeepMind researchers, is now valued at more than $500 million.

articles.title: Realta Fusion generates electricity directly from a fusion reaction, an apparent first
articles.description: “We can take power from a plasma,” Kieran Furlong, co-founder and CEO of Realta Fusion, told TechCrunch. The milestone shows “what’s possible,” he added.

articles.title: Google introduces a faster, cheaper image generator with Nano Banana 2 Lite
articles.description: Google is updating its image generator to make it faster and cheaper, making it a more useful tool for creators looking to make AI content.

articles.title: Clicks shows off its BlackBerry-inspired phone in a new hands-on video
articles.description: A new video shows the final production version of the upcoming Clicks Communicator, a BlackBerry-like smartphone that runs modern apps.

articles.title: Nvidia competitor Etched hits $5B valuation, $1B in sales for AI chip
articles.description: Nvidia AI chip competitor Etched says it has already booked $1 billion under contract for the inference systems powered by its chip.

articles.title: Anthropic launches Claude Sonnet 5 as a cheaper way to run agents
articles.description: Anthropic’s Claude Sonnet 5 brings stronger agentic capabilities, lower pricing, and improved safety, positioning the model as a cheaper alternative to Opus, GPT-5.5, and Gemini Pro.

articles.title: Acti puts AI agents directly into your smartphone keyboard
articles.description: Acti is betting the smartphone keyboard is the next home for AI assistants. The startup's new keyboard for iOS and Android works across apps and lets users create custom AI-powered shortcuts using natural language.

articles.title: Threads adds new features to Live Chats as it expands access
articles.description: The updates include translations, new tools for hosts, and more.

articles.title: Anthropic’s Claude Science bets on workflow, not a new model, to win over scientists
articles.description: Anthropic's Claude Science is a workbench that gives scientists one environment to do computational research, saving them from the need to bounce between databases, pipelines, and tools.

articles.title: NASA inspector general suggests Boeing's Starliner will now be a decade late
articles.description: Starliner's certification may be delayed to 2027, 10 years later than Boeing's original schedule.

articles.title: A space history mystery: What happened to the Viking arm used 50 years ago?
articles.description: A timely tale about a 50-year-old robotic arm...

articles.title: UK likely to intervene in Paramount takeover of Warner Bros. Discovery
articles.description: The acquisition was approved without concessions by the Department of Justice in June.

articles.title: Scientists find no link between Tylenol and autism, again, after Trump warning
articles.description: After Trump's claims, Tylenol usage dropped during pregnancies.

articles.title: June research roundup: 6 cool science stories we almost missed
articles.description: Also, the science of poop's distinctive shape, boron buckyballs, and the secret to a soccer feint.

articles.title: Reddit will require you to log in to use old.reddit.com
articles.description: Logged-out Old Reddit access is “significant source of abusive scraping."

articles.title: Amazon blames piracy apps with malware for killing new Fire Stick sideloading
articles.description: New Fire Stick OS helps Amazon block third-party homepage launchers, ad blockers.

articles.title: NASA may send a backup, nuclear-powered Mars rover to the Moon
articles.description: "That would be an awesome capability."

articles.title: Google kills Tenor GIF API, forcing changes at X, Discord, and more
articles.description: Tenor still connects to Google apps, but other platforms must look elsewhere for GIFs.

articles.title: Apple takes Epic fight over app store fees to the Supreme Court
articles.description: Supreme Court will weigh if Apple contempt finding in Epic case is “erroneous.”

articles.title: New attack provides one more reason why AI browsers are a bad idea
articles.description: Telling an LLM that 2 + 2 = 5 is enough to make it follow forbidden instructions.

articles.title: Google's new Nano Banana 2 Lite image model is its fastest and cheapest yet
articles.description: They may not look as good, but Nano Banana 2 Lite images only take a few seconds to create.

articles.title: RFK Jr. stacks FDA panel with peptide peddlers as FDA scientists oppose access
articles.description: Peptide drugs are popular, but FDA scientists warn they're untested, may be harmful.

articles.title: Trump's plan to redesign every .gov website leads to AI-designed horrors
articles.description: A year in, National Design Studio delays plan to update government web standards.

articles.title: The US going 100% EV by 2040 would save more than 100k lives, study says
articles.description: Much of it comes from heavy-duty trucks and buses that burn diesel.

articles.title: Trump asked Musk for SpaceX stock to seed US kids’ savings accounts, report says

articles.title: Florida bans local governments from pursuing net-zero emissions goals
articles.description: Gov. Ron DeSantis calls it a crackdown on "radical climate policies."

articles.title: Ars Live, today: The latest on the aftermath of the New Glenn catastrophe
articles.description: Join us on the livestream at 1 pm ET and ask questions about the aftermath of New Glenn.

articles.title: US offers $10 million for info on group behind Signal and WhatsApp hacking spree
articles.description: Operation by two Russia-state groups has been ongoing since at least March.

articles.title: South Korea to spend $1T on more memory chip production and humanoid robots
articles.description: South Korea targets physical AI lead and commercial humanoid robots by 2028.

tech.summary:
今日科技动态摘要

1. **融资与上市动态**：Lime 在多年铺垫后终于通过 IPO 融资 1.67 亿美元；Venice AI 以 6500 万美元 A 轮融资成为独角兽，主打隐私优先的 AI 平台；Wayve 以 85 亿美元估值推出 8500 万美元员工要约收购。
2. **AI 产品与商业化**：Google 的智能助手 Gemini Spark 现已登陆 Mac；Google 推出更快更便宜的图像生成器 Nano Banana 2 Lite；Meta 效仿 SpaceX，计划将过剩的 AI 算力变现。
3. **行业重大变动**：索尼宣布将于 2028 年停止生产实体 PlayStation 游戏光盘；“互联网之父”正式退休；特朗普政府解除对 Anthropic 的 Mythos 和 Fable 模型的限制。
4. **前沿科技突破**：Realta Fusion 首次实现从聚变反应中直接发电；OpenClaw 终于登陆 Android 和 iOS 平台；Clicks 展示了一款受黑莓启发的手机实机视频。
5. **创业与活动**：TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 公布“Builder Stage”议程，聚焦初创企业规模化实战策略；Startup Battlefield 澳大利亚站申请即将于 7 月 6 日截止；DeepMind 三人组开发的扑克 AI 现已用于量化对冲基金盈利。

**最值得关注的发展**：Realta Fusion 首次实现聚变反应直接发电，标志着清洁能源领域的重大突破；同时，Venice AI 以隐私优先理念快速崛起，反映出 AI 行业对用户数据保护的高度重视。

ai.summary:
今日AI动态摘要

1. **语音AI与模型部署进展**：Hugging Face与Cerebras合作推出Gemma 4，用于实时语音AI；同时Hugging Face新增一键在HF Jobs上运行vLLM服务器的功能，简化模型部署流程。

2. **AI基准测试与评估创新**：Hugging Face发布ScarfBench，用于评估AI代理在企业Java框架迁移中的表现；并推出“Every Eval Ever”功能，将所有评估结果整合到模型页面中。

3. **专业化趋势与模型架构突破**：Hugging Face强调AI专业化不可避免，同时发布DiScoFormer，一种可跨分布处理密度与分数的单Transformer模型，拓展了模型架构的通用性。

4. **AI教育、生产与金融应用**：Google在纽约与教育界共商AI课堂应用，发布英国AI生产力白皮书，并升级Google Finance应用；OpenAI则分析ChatGPT采用扩展情况，并推出基因基准测试GeneBench-Pro。

5. **技术修复与劳动力研究**：OpenAI修复了一个存在18年的核心转储流行病相关bug，并发布欧洲AI劳动力机会地图，聚焦人才分布与产业机遇。

**今日最值得关注的发展**：Hugging Face与Cerebras联手推动Gemma 4在实时语音AI中的应用，结合一键部署vLLM服务器，显著降低了高性能模型落地的门槛。

articles.title: China to introduce new train timetable from July 1, including high-speed train service between Beijing and Urumqi

cctv.summary:
今日新闻联播动态摘要

1. [重点] 中国将于7月1日起实施新的列车运行图，新增北京至乌鲁木齐的高铁服务。  
2. [重点] 新列车运行图旨在优化铁路运输效率，提升旅客出行体验。  
3. [重点] 北京至乌鲁木齐高铁线路将大幅缩短两地间的旅行时间，促进区域经济联系。  

今日最值得关注的发展是中国铁路网络进一步扩展，北京至乌鲁木齐高铁的开通标志着西部地区交通基础设施的重大升级。
